snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

snippet.title: Ramyug | Official Trailer | Kunal Kohli | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
Ek andekhe roop mein धर्म aur अधर्म ka paath padhaane aa raha hai रामयुग!

All episodes of #Ramyug out on 6th May.

Directed by Kunal Kohli

Key Cast: Diganth Manchale, Akkshay Dogra, Aishwarya Ojha, Kabir Duhan Singh, Vivan Bhatena, Navdeep Pallapolu, Anish John Kokken, Shishir Mohan Sharma, Jatin Sial, Shweta Gulati, Suparna Marwah, Mamta Verma, Tisca Chopra, Dalip Tahil, Anup Soni, Vikram Singh Chauhan, Hemant Kumar Pandey, Arun Singh, Ravi Jhankal, Shaan Grover, Amit Madan Gaur, Teena Singh and Danish Akhtar

About Ramyug: 
Rama, prince of Ayodhya, won the hand of the beautiful princess Sita, but was exiled with her and his brother Laksmana for 14 years through the plotting of his stepmother. In the forest, Sita was abducted by Ravana, and Rama with the help of Son of Vayu, Hanuman, gathered an army of monkeys and bears to search for her. The allies attacked Lanka, killed Ravana, and rescued Sita. After the couple's triumphant return to Ayodhya, Rama's righteous rule (Ram-raj) inaugurated a golden age for all mankind. 

The epic's poetic stature and marvelous story means that the story of Rama has been constantly retold by some of India's greatest writers both in Sanskrit and regional languages. It is one of the staples of various dramatic traditions, in court drama, dance-dramas, and in shadow-puppet theatres. In northern India, the annual Ram-lila or 'Rama-play' is performed at the autumn festival of Dassehra to celebrate with Rama and Sita the eventual triumph of light over darkness.

Ramyug the latest visual interpretation of this ancient text, seeks to bring modern technology in a never before used manner to narrate the epic.

#MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer #KunalKohli #DiganthManchale #AkkshayDogra #AishwaryaOjha #KabirDuhanSingh #VivanBhatena #NavdeepPallapolu #AnishJohnKokken #ShishirMohanSharma #JatinSial #ShwetaGulati #SuparnaMarwah #MamtaVerma #TiscaChopra #DalipTahil #AnupSoni #VikramSinghChauhan #HemantKumarPandey #ArunSingh #RaviJhankal #ShaanGrover #AmitMadanGaur #TeenaSingh #DanishAkhtar

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah 

Mastered by Sunny M.R.

Video:
Featuring - Siddharth Nigam & Ashi Singh
Video Director - United White Flag - Ramji Gulati
Choreographed by - Shashank Dogra
Casting by - Purple Star Entertainment - Forum Vaghela
DOP - Rahul Arora
Editor - Varun Arora
VFX - Vishal Panchal
Drone - Tanish Arora
Styling - Dharti Gulati
Production - Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
Makeup & Hair - Ishan Malhotra
Photography - Anish Ajmera
Team UWF - Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
----------------------------------------------------------------

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

Amazon Music - Apple Music - Gaana - Spotify - Wynk - Jio Saavn - Hungama - Resso - YouTube Music.

Connect with the song: https://tmmusic.fanlink.to/Kareeb

----------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics :

Dekha tune
Dekha Maine
Chori Chori Yun to sau dafa
Sau Dafa

Jeele thoda
Ho na jaaye
Baton baton mein hi yu subha
Yu Subha
Sau baaton ki baat hai ek main hu tera.. toh kya sochna
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb

Aaya tu jab se nazron mein
Maine fir khwab dekha na
Hoga kal se ye khabron mein
Teri haan ki bachi hai deriyaan
Tu rahega mere zikron mein
Ab kabhi koi hoga na
Keh na paau chaahe lafzon mein
Phir bhi karta rahunga main bayaan
Tu chaahiye baaki Kar li hai
Maine saari tai yaariyan..
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
----------------------------------------------------------------

అచ్యుత్
చక్రధర్ దిట్టకవి

డైరెక్టర్ ఆఫ్ ఫోటోగ్రఫీ 
వివేక్ నెక్కల

సంగీతం
సృజన్ శశాంక
రాజ్ ప్రకాష్

ఎడిటింగ్-డి.ఐ -సౌండ్ మిక్సింగ్ 
తారా రెడ్డి 

ప్రొడక్షన్ మేనేజర్ 
శశికాంత్ 

అసిస్టెంట్ డైరెక్టర్స్

అనిల్
గోపీనాథ్

snippet.title: Bhide के खिलाफ निकला Morcha Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता-Ep 3155 - 29th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/the-troubled-bhide-1000116221?

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3155 : Vinod Gathers A Mob OF Parents.
---------------------------------------------------------
Vinod asks Jethalal that was he able to convince Bhide. To which Jethalal answered Bhide is not convinced. Vinod then gets angry and calls for a mob of parents on Bhide. Bhide on the other hand is worried about how will he pay back all the fees. To know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 20 Teaser - 29th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 20 Teaser - 29th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Did you know Har Pal Geo is now in the US? Subscribe and hit the bell icon to catch Top Pakistani Dramas and satisfy all your entertainment needs

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की | Episode 118| Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
As Virendra and Purvi get ready to complete their marriage rituals, a surprising guest arrives at their celebration. Catch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode for more.
#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.description:
Omkar tries to contact Mayura on realising that he and Mayura are being deceived and pitched against each other by someone on purpose. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.description:

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: दही आलू करी बनाने का सीक्रेट तरीका - Dahi Wale Aloo Sabzi Recipe - CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, aaj mera secret method le kar aaya hu Dahi Aloo ki Sabzi Banane ka, ye jarur ye try karie... Dahiwale aloo mast bante hai CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients:
Aloo - 4
Namak - taste hisab se
Dahi - 1 cup
Kala Namak - 1/2 tsp
Turmeric Powder - 1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - 1 tsp
Dhania Powder - 1 1/2 tsp
Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
Jeera - 1/2 tsp
Heeng - 1/4 tsp
Hari Mirch - 1 cut karke
Adrak - 1 inch
Pyaaz - 1 fine cut
Namak - taste hisab se
Pani - 1/2 cup
Garam Masala - 1/2 tsp
Hara Dhania - 1 tbsp
Kasoori Methi - 1/2 tsp


Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.description:

Episode 3154 : Bhide Calls For A Parent Teacher Meeting
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide is very concerned about his students future and their behaviour. None of the students are taking the online class seriously so he has called for an online PTA meeting. He is very upset so Tapu Sena comes in for the rescue and cheer him up. To know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Piyu Bole - Janaki Omkumar | GMC Thrissur
snippet.description:
A video done during lockdown last year 😌
- To propagate the need of love to oneself.

Initially, it was just a humble attempt at doing a choreograpy by @manishmandy @FAMOUS FAMILY but after the first rate editing from Rahul Venu, I couldn't give it a better caption than Balram versus Tharadas. 😂😂

But on further thought, jokes aside (yeah my cheesy acting), it is essential that you love and seek happiness in yourself to heal yourself and the people around you. Stop looking for the one. Be the one. Else you'll be just depending on another person to fill the voids within you. 🤷‍

Self love doesn't mean being narcissistic, or those extra selfies, it's about working on your relationship with yourself, through all the highs and lows and still be able to treat yourself with compassion and respect.And then one would never want to kill oneself. 

Secondarily, you will not let anyone walk through your mind with their feet dirty like MK Gandhi rightly said.And that's, the island to swim to.🍂🍀

#piyubole#selflove#quarantinedance  #indiandancers#dancersofindia india#whackingdance

snippet.title: Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

Sonotek Music Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hawa Baji . Another Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung By Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Priya Soni  Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Amit Saini Rohtakiya

#AMITSAINIROHTAKIYA​ #HawaBaji​  #NewHaryanviSongs​ 
#PriyaSoni #Hawabajisong #Haryanavi2021 #Sonotek
#Haryanavi2021​ #SonotekMusic​ #AmitsainiRohtakiya​

♪ Available on ♪
https://gaana.com/album/hawa-baji

Starring :-  Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Singer :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Lyrics :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Female Artist :- Priya Soni 
Music - GR Music (+918708626865)
Mixing & Mastering - GR Music (+918708626865) 
Edit Di :- Parveen $word
D.O.P :- Munish Sharma
Director :- Jeetu G
Producer : SONOTEK 
Label : Sonotek Music

https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Music-105304197912151
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusic​​
                                            https://www.instagram.com/sonotek_video


Song Lyrics 

 R Tu Muh P Kuch Hai 
Or Piche Kuch Or Hai 
   Do Char Facklanduva Mai
  Chaale Tera Jor Hai  
Bhai Bhai Kehke Seli maar kar Gya   
Ib Saini Dhokebazi Ni ni

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rrr Meri Photova Ne Paad Ke kai Chode Hore hai 
Rrr Kute Apne ilakya MaiRrr Makha  Ghode Hore hai
Amit tt Tu Sidha Hoke Takra Liye Rr Par Jall Saji Nii

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rr badmashi Ki Speech Thodi Makha Kam Diya Kar 
Rr Makha Tadke Badama Gelya Dudh Liya Kar 
Rrr Pani K Tu Bhar K Dram Rakhe se.  
Rrr Gani Hanji Hhanji Ni 

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

रै तू मुँह पै कुछ है  रै पाछै कुछ और है 
 दो चार फकलंडुआ मै रै चालै तेरा जोर है 
  रै भाई भाई कैहके सिली मार करग्या 
 इब  सैणी धोखेबाज़ी नी 
 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 
 झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै  घणी  हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै मेरी फोटुआ नै पाड़ कै कई चौड़े होरे है 
 रै कुत्ते अपणे इलाक्या मै रै मखा घोड़े होरे है 
अमित तै तू सीधा होकै टकरा लिए  
रोहतकिये  तै सीधा तू  टकरा लिए 
 पर जालसाज़ी  नी  

 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै बदमाशी की स्पीच थोड़ी  मखा  कम दिया कर 
रै मखा तड़कै बादमा गेल्या  दूध लिया कर 
 रै  पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै  
रै मखा पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै
   रै घणी हा जी हा जी नी 

रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी

snippet.title: LIVE - Full Moon Meditation with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar | Health | Happiness | Healing
snippet.description:
Join the world's most effortless meditation program - Sahaj Samadhi Meditation : Online with Bhanumathi Narasimhan from 7-9th May on http://aoliv.in/meditation



Maximize happiness, health & immunity. Cut down stress, anxiety, and depression! Learn the powerful breathing technique Sudarshan Kriya, along with Pranayama, Yoga, Meditation and Practical Tips for everyday living in the online Meditation and Breath workshop (The Art of Living Happiness Program).

 Register now 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

ar.title: LIVE - تأمل اكتمال القمر مع غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار | الصحة | السعادة | شفاء
ar.description:
انضم إلى برنامج التأمل الأكثر جهدًا في العالم - Sahaj Samadhi Meditation: عبر الإنترنت مع Bhanumathi Narasimhan من 7 إلى 9 مايو على http://aoliv.in/meditation



 تعظيم السعادة والصحة والمناعة. قلل من التوتر والقلق والاكتئاب! تعلم تقنية التنفس القوية Sudarshan Kriya ، جنبًا إلى جنب مع Pranayama واليوجا والتأمل والنصائح العملية للحياة اليومية في ورشة عمل التأمل والنفس عبر الإنترنت (برنامج Art of Living Happiness Program).

 سجل الآن 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 حول جوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار

 غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار هو زعيم روحي إنساني مشهور عالميًا وسفير السلام والقيم الإنسانية. من خلال حياته وعمله ، ألهم Gurudev الملايين حول العالم برؤية لعالم خالٍ من التوتر والعنف.
 أسس جوروديف The Art of Living ، وهي منظمة غير ربحية تشارك في إدارة الإجهاد ومبادرات الخدمة. تعمل البرامج التي صممها Gurudev على تمكين الأشخاص من خلال التقنيات والأدوات ليعيشوا حياة أعمق وأكثر سعادة.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

hi.title: LIVE - गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के साथ पूर्णिमा ध्यान | स्वास्थ्य | खुशी | उपचारात्मक
hi.description:
दुनिया के सबसे सहज ध्यान कार्यक्रम में शामिल हों - सहज समाधि ध्यान: भानुमति नरसिम्हन के साथ ऑनलाइन 7-9 मई से http://aoliv.in/meditation पर



 खुशी, स्वास्थ्य और प्रतिरक्षा को अधिकतम करें। तनाव, चिंता और अवसाद में कटौती करें! ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और ब्रीथ वर्कशॉप (द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग हैप्पीनेस प्रोग्राम) में रोजमर्रा की जिंदगी के लिए प्राणायाम, योग, ध्यान और व्यावहारिक टिप्स के साथ शक्तिशाली श्वास तकनीक सुदर्शन क्रिया सीखें।

 अब रजिस्टर करें a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम तकनीक और उपकरणों के साथ लोगों को एक गहरी और आनंदमय जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर
